scripts.test:browserstack:mobile-android: cross-env BROWSERSTACK_CONFIG_FILE=browserstack.mobile-android.yml browserstack-node-sdk playwright test mobile/tests --project="Mobile Chrome"
scripts.test:browserstack:mobile-ios: cross-env BROWSERSTACK_CONFIG_FILE=browserstack.mobile-ios.yml browserstack-node-sdk playwright test mobile/tests --project="Mobile Safari"
scripts.test:browserstack: npm run test:browserstack:ui && npm run test:browserstack:mobile-android && npm run test:browserstack:mobile-ios
